'''Meido''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Unidentified Adin species|non-Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Adin]] circa [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. He was one of the senators elected after the [[New Republic amnesty bill]] allowed former supporters of the [[Galactic Empire]] to run for elected offices within the government that had replaced it and openly accused [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] of causing the [[Bombing of the Senate Hall]].<ref name="TNR" />

{{Char-stub}}
